results.label: verifiable_data
results.text:
Trading claims are easy. Verification is harder.

I’m testing a data feed where the signal promise is backed by live performance tracking — not screenshots or vague claims.

Audit the idea: https://edebell67.github.io/epics/verify/

#Trading #AlgoTrading

results.label: ranked_opportunity
results.text:
Too many setups can be as bad as no setup.

I’m testing a ranked opportunity feed that cuts through the noise and surfaces the strongest live candidates first.

See the ranked feed: https://edebell67.github.io/epics/ranked/

#Trading #FinTwit
